name_en: Model of a bonito fishing boat
description_en: A model bonito fishing boat classified as a tangible folk cultural property. It is municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 2001-04-27. It is located at Chūōdai Iino Itchōme.

Papermaking tools classified as tangible folk cultural properties. They are municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 2002-04-30. They are located at Tōno-machi Iritōno Aza Suwa (Iwaki Tōno Living Art Gallery).

Votive tablets (ema) classified as tangible folk cultural properties. They are municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 2003-04-25. They are located at Jōban Sekifune-machi Suwashita.

Coal mining production tools classified as tangible folk cultural properties. They are municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 2006-04-28. They are located at Uchigō Shiramizumachi Hirohata (Mirokusawa Coal Mine Museum).

name_romaji: Gohōden chigo dengaku; furyū no yōgurui
name_en: Implements of the Gohōden children's dengaku and furyū
description_en: Implements classified as tangible folk cultural properties. They are municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 2017-05-01. They are located at Nishiki-machi Gohōden.

name_en: Costumes for the spear-raising rite of Gohōden Kumano Shrine
description_en: Ritual costumes classified as tangible folk cultural properties. They are municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 2021-05-06. They are located at Nishiki-machi Gohōden.

name_romaji: Hakushiki-jō men; kokushiki-jō men (tsuketari) suzu; menbako
name_en: White and black old-man masks, with bells and mask box
description_en: Ritual masks with attached bells and a mask box, classified as tangible folk cultural properties. They are municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 2022-05-02. They are located at Kashima-machi Shimoyata Aza Chirino (Denshōgō).

name_en: Yamasoto dance of Akai Suwa Shrine
description_en: A folk dance classified as an intangible folk cultural property. It is municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 1976-05-27. It is located at Taira Akai Aza Dankoda.
A folk dance classified as an intangible folk cultural property. It is municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 1988-01-20. It is located at Taira Suganami Aza Miyamae.
A Buddhist nenbutsu folk dance classified as an intangible folk cultural property. It is municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 1992-03-27. It is performed throughout the city.
Lion dances (shishimai) classified as an intangible folk cultural property. They are municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 1992-03-27. They are performed throughout the city.
A nenbutsu drumming performance classified as an intangible folk cultural property. It is municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 1993-03-26. It is located at Tabito-machi.
A kagura performance classified as an intangible folk cultural property. It is municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 1994-03-25. It is located at Yamada-machi Inoue.
A folk ritual classified as an intangible folk cultural property. It is municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 2003-04-25. It is located at Taira Numanouchi Aza Shingai.

name_romaji: Sumiyoshi-jinja no yabusame narabi ni chokushi sankōshiki
name_en: Yabusame and imperial-envoy rite of Sumiyoshi Shrine
description_en: A horseback archery and ceremonial rite classified as an intangible folk cultural property. It is municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 2004-04-28. It is located at Onahama Sumiyoshi Aza Sumiyoshi.

name_romaji: Nakoso Kunitama-jinja no kasutsukami oyobi kanren gyōji
name_en: Kasu-grasping and related events of Nakoso Kunitama Shrine
description_en: A folk ritual and related events classified as an intangible folk cultural property. It is municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 2023-05-01. It is located at Nakoso-machi Kubota Baba.
A shell mound classified as a historic site among monuments. It is municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 1976-11-03. It is located at Jōban Saigō-machi Kanayama.

A cliff-carved Buddhist image (magaibutsu) classified as a historic site among monuments. It is municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 1986-03-28. It is located at Onahama Sumiyoshi Aza Karami.
A tunnel tomb (yokoana) classified as a historic site among monuments. It is municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 1986-03-28. It is located at Taira Shimotakaku Aza Hachiman.
A stone slab stupa classified as a historic site among monuments. It is municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 1993-03-26. It is located at Yotsukura-machi Yakuō-ji Aza Hanawa.
A family graveyard classified as a historic site among monuments. It is municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 1997-05-13. It is located at Taira Aza Gomazawa.
A grave site classified as a historic site among monuments. It is municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 1997-05-13. It is located at Taira Aza Gomazawa.
A temple ruin classified as a historic site among monuments. It is municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 1997-05-13. It is located at Yoshima-machi Shimoyoshima Aza Ōdate.
A fortified residence ruin classified as a historic site among monuments. It is municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 1999-04-30. It is located at Taira Aza Takatsuki.
A castle ruin classified as a historic site among monuments. It is municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 2003-04-25. It is located at Tōno-machi Kamitōno.

name_romaji: Koshimaki yokoana bogun A18-gō yokoana bo
name_en: Tunnel tomb No. A18 of the Koshimaki tunnel tomb group
description_en: A tunnel tomb classified as a historic site among monuments. It is municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 2005-09-30. It is located at Taira Kamiyasaku Aza Koshimaki.
A family graveyard classified as a historic site among monuments. It is municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 2014-05-01. It is located at Taira Shimoarakawa Aza Suwashita.
A castle ruin classified as a historic site among monuments. It is municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 2017-05-01. It is located at Yoshima-machi Shimoyoshima Aza Ōdate.

A castle ruin classified as a historic site among monuments. It is municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 2017-05-01. It is located at Miwa-machi Kamimisaka Aza Honmachi, Nakamisaka Aza Ōkonda, and Nakamisaka Aza Hanyū.

name_en: Main-keep site of Iwaki Taira Castle
description_en: The main-keep (honmaru) ruin classified as a historic site among monuments. It is municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 2022-05-02. It is located at Taira Aza Kyūjōato.

name_en: Great ginkgo of Shiramizu Amida Hall
description_en: A large ginkgo tree classified as a natural monument. It is municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 1968-12-27. It is located at Uchigō Shiramizumachi Hirohata.

Paleozoic geological strata classified as a natural monument. They are municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 1972-10-12. They are located at Yotsukura-machi Tamayama Aza Motomura.

name_en: Warm-temperate shrine-grove vegetation of Samakumine Shrine
description_en: Shrine-grove vegetation classified as a natural monument. It is municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 1976-05-27. It is located at Taira Nakayama Aza Miyashita.

name_en: Shrine grove of Osaishoyama Kumano Shrine
description_en: A shrine grove classified as a natural monument. It is municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 1976-11-03. It is located at Tabito-machi Kuroda Aza Saidō.
A nagi (Nageia) tree classified as a natural monument. It is municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 1977-05-04. It is located at Ogawa-machi Uwadaira Aza Kumanomae.

name_en: Submarine volcanic rock mass of Mount Ishimori
description_en: A submarine volcanic rock mass classified as a natural monument. It is municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 1977-11-01. It is located at Taira Yotsunami Aza Ishimori.

name_romaji: Ōdaira Kumano-jinja no mukuroji; sakaki gun
name_en: Grove of mukuroji and sakaki at Ōdaira Kumano Shrine
description_en: A tree grove classified as a natural monument. It is municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 1977-11-01. It is located at Tōno-machi Ōdaira Aza Monomioka.
A marsh classified as a natural monument. It is municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 1986-03-28. It is located at Miwa-machi Sashio Aza Higashisaku.
A tabunoki (machilus) forest classified as a natural monument. It is municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 1988-03-25. It is located at Ena Aza Hashiride.
A fossil-bearing site classified as a natural monument. It is municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 1989-03-25. It is located at Ōhisa-machi Ohisa Aza Minamisawa.
